title: Set up Upstash Redis for caching, rate limiting, and session storage
summary: Install @upstash/redis, configure the client, implement caching patterns, rate limiting with @upstash/ratelimit, and session storage.
declaration: I will set up Upstash Redis using the @upstash/redis SDK. This is a serverless Redis client optimized for edge and serverless environments. If you need a traditional Redis client (ioredis) for a long-running server, say so before I begin.
